creator: parag@codegen.com
text:
The netatalk-sun port does not need to depend upon the
	tcp_wrapper port, at least for 3.* and later versions of the OS,
	since the libwrap.a library is now part of the normal build.

Fix: 

Wrap the line LIB_DEPENDS in the Makefile with some sort
	of OS-rev "if" so it continues to work for older revs of FBSD.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Go to /usr/ports/net/netatalk-asun, remove LIB_DEPENDS line,
	and build it.
